BP

Broxy

Local control plane

Standalone proxy

Dashboard

Admin login

Authenticate to manage the proxy

Overview

Traffic, tokens, and spend without extra infrastructure

Recent usage

Daily totals by model and client key

Recent requests

Metadata is always stored. Raw prompts/outputs depend on the client key policy.

Usage breakdown

Grouped by day, model, and key

Client API keys

Each key can opt into raw content logging independently.

Model routing

Clients can use an alias or a raw Bedrock model ID.

Runtime settings

This install is local-first and single-tenant.
